---
title: "Schedule"
sidebar: false
toc: false
page-layout: full
code-tools: false
---

::: {.schedule-page}

Here is the {{< var materials.sessions >}}-session learning journey for **{{< var course.number >}}**. Each session pairs a Lecture Notes chapter with a hands-on R lab and — when due — homework, a graded quiz, practice, and project milestones. Click a **topic** to open that session's page, or any **icon** to open that material directly.

::: {.schedule-legend}
[How to read:]{.schedule-legend-title} {{< fa book-open-reader >}} Notes &nbsp;·&nbsp; {{< fa laptop-code >}} Lab &nbsp;·&nbsp; {{< fa pencil >}} Homework &nbsp;·&nbsp; {{< fa circle-check >}} Quiz &nbsp;·&nbsp; {{< fa circle-question >}} Practice &nbsp;·&nbsp; {{< fa clipboard-list >}} Project &nbsp;—&nbsp; a [greyed]{.sched-none-inline} icon means none that session.
:::

```{r}
#| label: schedule
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| output: asis

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr); library(dplyr); library(stringr); library(glue)
  library(purrr); library(kableExtra)
})

sched <- read_csv("data/schedule.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

## --- cell builders: a deep-link icon, or a greyed "none" icon -----------
link_icon <- function(href, fa, title) {
  glue('<a href="{href}" title="{title}" aria-label="{title}"><i class="fa-solid fa-{fa}"></i></a>')
}
none_icon <- function(fa, label) {
  glue('<span class="sched-none" title="No {label} this session" aria-label="No {label} this session"><i class="fa-solid fa-{fa}"></i></span>')
}
join_links <- function(x) paste(x, collapse = " ")

# Lecture notes (multi-value; digit-prefixed slug = chapter, else appendix)
cell_notes <- function(s) {
  if (is.na(s) || s == "") return(none_icon("book-open-reader", "reading"))
  parts <- str_trim(str_split(s, ";")[[1]])
  join_links(map_chr(parts, function(x) {
    sub <- if (str_detect(x, "^[0-9]")) "chapters" else "appendices"
    link_icon(glue("/notes/{sub}/{x}.html"), "book-open-reader", "Lecture notes")
  }))
}
# Labs (multi-value; /labs/labs/<slug>.html)
cell_labs <- function(s) {
  if (is.na(s) || s == "") return(none_icon("laptop-code", "lab"))
  parts <- str_trim(str_split(s, ";")[[1]])
  join_links(map_chr(parts, ~ link_icon(glue("/labs/labs/{.x}.html"), "laptop-code", "R lab")))
}
# Homework -> website assignment PROMPT page (never the solutions book)
cell_hw <- function(s) {
  if (is.na(s) || s == "") return(none_icon("pencil", "homework"))
  link_icon(glue("assignment/{s}.html"), "pencil", "Homework")
}
# Graded quiz -> student-facing quizzes overview (Blackboard for the real quiz);
# NEVER the instructor /quizzes answer-key book.
cell_quiz <- function(s) {
  if (is.na(s) || s == "") return(none_icon("circle-check", "graded quiz"))
  n <- str_extract(s, "(?<=quiz)[0-9]+")
  link_icon(glue("assignment/quizzes.html#quiz-{n}"), "circle-check", glue("Module Quiz {n}"))
}
# Practice quiz -> student-facing /practice book
cell_practice <- function(s) {
  if (is.na(s) || s == "") return(none_icon("circle-question", "practice quiz"))
  link_icon(glue("/practice/chapters/{s}.html"), "circle-question", "Practice quiz")
}
# Project milestone label -> website project page
cell_project <- function(lbl) {
  if (is.na(lbl) || lbl == "") return(none_icon("clipboard-list", "project milestone"))
  pg <- lbl |> str_to_lower() |>
    str_replace("^p1 ", "project-1-") |>
    str_replace("^p2 ", "project-2-")
  link_icon(glue("assignment/{pg}.html"), "clipboard-list", lbl)
}
pad2 <- function(n) str_pad(n, 2, pad = "0")

part_name <- c(
  "Welcome"   = "Welcome",
  "I"         = "Part I · Foundations of Linear Regression",
  "II"        = "Part II · Extensions of Linear Regression",
  "III"       = "Part III · Model Evaluation",
  "IV"        = "Part IV · Categorical Outcomes",
  "Synthesis" = "Synthesis"
)

tbl <- sched %>%
  mutate(
    Session  = as.character(session),
    Topic    = glue('<a href="content/{pad2(session)}-content.html">{title}</a>'),
    Notes    = map_chr(notes, cell_notes),
    Lab      = map_chr(labs, cell_labs),
    HW       = map_chr(homework, cell_hw),
    Quiz     = map_chr(quiz, cell_quiz),
    Practice = map_chr(practice, cell_practice),
    Project  = map_chr(project, cell_project)
  )

# contiguous Part groups for pack_rows()
runs <- rle(tbl$part)
pack_index <- setNames(runs$lengths, unname(part_name[runs$values]))

ic <- function(fa, lbl) glue('<i class="fa-solid fa-{fa}" aria-hidden="true"></i> {lbl}')

ktbl <- tbl %>%
  select(Session, Topic, Notes, Lab, HW, Quiz, Practice, Project) %>%
  kbl(
    escape = FALSE,
    align = "clcccccc",
    col.names = c("Session", "Topic",
                  ic("book-open-reader", "Notes"), ic("laptop-code", "Lab"),
                  ic("pencil", "HW"), ic("circle-check", "Quiz"),
                  ic("circle-question", "Practice"), ic("clipboard-list", "Project")),
    table.attr = 'class="schedule-table table"'
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = TRUE) %>%
  column_spec(1, width = "4em") %>%
  column_spec(2, width = "16em") %>%
  pack_rows(index = pack_index,
            label_row_css = "background:#0B3D66;color:#fff;font-weight:700;")

cat('<div class="schedule-scroll">\n', as.character(ktbl), '\n</div>', sep = "")
```

:::
